            "content": "Add explicit nullptr constructor/equality operators to TWeakInterfacePtr Mark functions in TWeakInterfacePtr [[nodiscard]]",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed overallocation for unused null terminators in TStringBuilder.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added TFunctionWithContext to adapt a callable into a function pointer and context",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improve accuracy of GC time limit by setting object destroy granularity to 10 (instead of 100) and provide a way for it to be tweaked per project with gc.IncrementalBeginDestroyGranularity.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized ParkingLot callback code generation",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated UE::Core::Private::StringLength to use TCString::Strlen outside of a constant-evaluated context, to speed up compile times with MSVC.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE_IF_CONSTEVAL and UE_IF_NOT_CONSTEVAL.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated Oodle to 2.9.14.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Used InitializeCriticalSectionAndSpinCount to avoid an extra function call during construction of FWindowsRecursiveMutex.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added CConvertibleTo concept mirroring std::convertible_to.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a configurable intrusive unfair non-recursive mutex.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added TInstancedStruct::NetSerialize function.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed contention on root flags when pinning weakobjectptrs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved the logging backlog to minimize the number of missed log lines during the initialization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added TLogTemplate and control over log template allocation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added IsLocked and IsLockedShared to the mutex types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add Async.ParallelFor.DisableOversubscription which if enabled will only use existing threads which can be faster when cores are saturated.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for nested $format in structured log formatting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Intel OneAPI and Microsoft Clang 19 HWPGO integration.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an ExecFileOverride resource to BootstrapPackagedGame.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized FLazyName to support constant initialization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deflate, gzip & lz4hc compressors now honor COMPRESS_BiasSpeed and COMPRESS_BiasSize",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added TExternalStringBuilder and support for TStringBuilder&lt;0&gt;",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improvements to GameFeaturesSubsystem and FPluginDescriptor:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a new hook to PluginDescriptor to allow customized loading of uplugin json data.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated GFS to ensure that, at least in the editor, we will try to use the PluginManager's copy of the plugin data rather than re-reading it and deserializing it from json ourselves. This is necessary to take advantage of the customized loading.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled custom crash handling for GPU crashes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimization for FSoftObjectPath::ResolveObjectInternal to avoid the round trip to/from string.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add a console command, core.ResetEnsureState, to reset the ensure state so they fire again. This will cause all non-always ensures to trigger again if they've already been suppressed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reduced memory use by FOutputDeviceFile by 992 KiB in the default configuration.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added better error messages when TLess, TGreater and TEqualTo when used with a type without the corresponding operator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now validate LinkerSave unmapped objects against the package harvester excluded object list. This removes the limitation of asserting when FindObject is called while GIsSavingPackage is set.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FPaths:CreateStandardFilename: changed behavior to normalize paths that cannot be standardized: .. is collapsed when possible.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CNotCVRefTo concept.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed dependencies on ParkingLot from Windows stack walking",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made the MSVC implementations of FPlatformMath::CountLeadingZeros and FPlatformMath::CountTrailingZeros constexpr.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added format string validation to LowLevelFatalError.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CStringViewable and UE::CCompatibleStringViewable concepts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "ThinLTO is now enabled by default for Clang based toolchains.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an experimental plugin, Global Configuration Data, that can be used as a single point of access to data that may be provided from different systems.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Can be used to have console and config data added to blueprints without additional code.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Additional data routers can be registers to expand on what data sources are available to the system.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CArithmetic concept.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CCompatibleCharType concept and some usage in TStringView.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UEOps.h to aid in the correct generation of all binary comparison operators based on a couple of simple member function definitions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Replaced the UTF8CHAR enum with C++20's char8_t.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added checks for non-trivially-relocatable types being used in containers, particularly FGCObject-derived types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE_REWRITE, a replacement for FORCEINLINE intended to be used on macro-like functions (rather than for optimization) by 'rewriting' a function call as a different expression.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled override max printed reference chains via `gc.MaxReferenceChainsToPrint` Cvar.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FVector2D deprecated comparison operators (from 5.2 onwards) removed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Remove deprecated FLinearColor methods, deprecate unused DXT block structs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled TSharedPtr and TUniquePtr to be usable as keys in sorted containers, and TUniquePtr to be usable as keys in hashed containers.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added std::initializer_list support to TSparseArray.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UPS cooking indeterminism for TBox[2] structs on stack Make ForceInit constructor zero out padding.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed managed storage handle attempting to resolve an unmanaged file more than once after the manager becomes active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CDerivedFrom concept.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added debug visualizers for UE::Math::TVector2&lt;&gt; and FDeprecateSlateVector2D.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Extended `gc.PerformGCWhileAsyncLoading` to provide the option to garbage collect while async loading, only when low memory is detected (based on gc.LowMemory.MemoryThresholdMB).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Package flags are now thread-safe.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add TargetRules.bIdenticalCodeFolding setting (--icf=all).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added intrusive unset optional support to TNotNull.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a benchmark for mutex types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added CSameAs and CDecaysTo concepts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CIntegral concept.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added tests for Algo::StableRemoveIf.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added configs managing how GenericPlatformMallocCrash handles allocation requests on non-crashing threads, allowing them to permanently suspend on allocs/frees, suspend on allocs and skip frees, or process as normal.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed dependency on FCriticalSection and ParkingLot in memory allocators.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Retry in the shared mutex TryLockShared while there is not an exclusive lock.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for joining non-contiguous ranges in TStringBuilder.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for optional sub-object references in localized structured log formatting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reduced codegen impact of ensure() macro.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an overload of CreateLogTemplate that takes the format as FText.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for $locformat in structured log formatting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added NotNullGet for retrieving the inner value from a TNotNull without an explicit cast.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Experimental Visual Studio 2026 support.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new experimental API: SpringMath:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This includes some useful functions for critically based spring damping",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added experimental blueprint library for spring math to expose functions to BP",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added SpringMath::ExponentialSmoothingApproxQuat to mirror the existing function FMath::ExponentialSmoothingApprox.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for creating Property Bag Placeholder types for entity prefabs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This is done via a new table added to package files: ImportTypeHierarchy table.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Each entry of that table contains hierarchical information for every FObjectImport entry that is a type (e.g., UClass).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This is the second part of a 2 part change. The first change introduced the package file header change along with the object version bump.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This change adds the remaining logic to save/load the new table and the change to use it when creating placeholders.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for AVX10.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added write helpers to RapidJsonUtilsAdded UE::Json::WriteCompact and UE::Json::WritePretty, to write a UE::Json::FDocument to a FString in either compact or pretty form.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::Json::MakeStringRef and UE::Json::MakeStringValue to help convert a FStringView to a UE::Json::FStringRef or UE::Json::FValue when building a JSON DOM.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added some additional aliases to UE::Json that are needed when building a JSON DOM.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Switched UE::Json aliases to use the UE FMemory allocator, rather than rapidjson::CrtAllocator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added --prioritize-dependency-scanning SN-DBS build option.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added `FNonshrinkingAllocator`, which changes the shrinking policy to No by default.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added hidden MetaData works for base structs in Instanced Structs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cooker:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "CookPackageSplitter: Changed the return value of GetGenerateList to a struct (and changed the name to ReportGenerationManifest) so that generators can request that the package containing the generator be not saved.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Deprecated the ability to run the cook inside the editor process when launched from editor. The cook instead should always be executed in a separate invocation of the CookCommandlet. This has been the default since 5.3, and we are now deprecating the ability to change that default and will remove all support for it in 5.9.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added the following commandline arguments:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "-cookshowremaining",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "-cookshowpackagenames",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "-cookshowinstigators",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "These provide a clearer behavior than -dpcvars=cook.displaymode=1|2|4.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Each flag can be specified with a value: -cookshowremaining=1|0, or with no value, defaulting to 1: -cookshowremaining.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "These flags override whatever value has been assigned via config or -dpcvars commandline.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Introduced a mechanism for render asset updates to be abandoned by owning `UStreamableRenderAssets` so `UStreamableRenderAssets` can be garbage collected independently (See r.Streaming.EnableAssetUpdateAbandons). Abandoned render assets are ticked during GC or every streaming update if r.Streaming.TickAbandonedRenderAssetUpdatesOnStreamingUpdate is true (defaults to true).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed FMonotonicTimeSpan::IsInfinity() to stop matching negative infinity.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed FMath::FindDeltaAngleDegrees and FMath::FindDeltaAngleRadians for input deltas outside [-540, 540] degrees.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "COMPILE_WARNING reports as error when WarningsAsErrors is being used.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a potential infinite loop in the serialization of packed ints when loading malformed values.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix potential deadlock in the scheduler if a foreground task is scheduling a background one.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix potential deadlock in object annotations because of 2 different locks used in different order.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made -VerifyGC and -NoVerifyGc take all verification cvars into account.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed invalid access to memory location error in UnrealBuildTool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made sure that pinned UObject are preventing GC of clusters they are part of.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed composite EPackageFlags not being shown in the debugger, caused by non-power-of-two enumerators.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed _GetUObjectPacked intrinsic for debug visualizers. This addresses an issue with visualizers for weak object ptrs not working in builds where UE_ENABLE_FUOBJECT_ITEM_PACKING == 1.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made TBox's InverseTransformBy and TransformProjectBy both check for box validity before transforming (matching TransformBy).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issues trying to load redirected native classes using the StreamableManager (and AssetManager).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug in GC timing where if it destroyed exactly 100 objects in a frame it could cause a large stall.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed many log categories having a default verbosity higher than their compile-time verbosity.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixing a crash in CppStructOps caused by unloading a dll at an inopportune time resulting in a dangling pointer to a vtable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed TMemoryWriter IndexSize to be a bit count.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "LaunchEngineLoop: Fixed a copy paste mistake in the error message, it now correctly identifies that it fails to load the Game Engine class instead of the Editor Engine class when instantiating GEngine.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "InstancedStruct: Fixed the operator= when copying from a TConstStructView.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The loader will now flush any remaining async loads before PreExit to avoid async loading to perform operations past the exit point.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UE_STATIC_ASSERT_COMPLETE_TYPE for zero-sized arrays.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled seeking to the end of a response body without returning CURL_SEEKFUNC_FAIL in the Curl implementation in DevHttp module.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UI layout for a particular view of the crash report dialog where the screenshot preview can cover button controls.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed clang miss-leading indentation warnings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Checked zlib init and shutdown for errors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cleaned up usages that expect nullptr_t to be in the global namespace.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed StaticDuplicateObject when Source Object class and Destination class are different.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash when loading content from corrupted pak or optional segment files.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled nuget audit for the dotnet Development configuration to prevent unactionable dotnet build errors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Force synchronous writes on type library input files.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed pipe and task timeout calculations that generated bad code.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deferred invoking the class initializer on duplicated objects until after subobject instancing has occurred.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disable 'C4702: unreachable code' when use bUseInlining is disabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed potential race condition in FConfigCacheIni::ForPlatform adding plugins without holding the lock.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed text import of delegate properties with full object paths, and made FDelegateProperty consistent with FPropertyMulticastDelegate on text export.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added static_asserts to TValueOrError to ensure that it's not instantiated with references.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a FARFilter with only WithPackageFlags or WithoutPackageFlags set failing to return any assets from IAssetRegistry::GetAssets(...).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Avoid TInstancedStruct::GetPtr/GetMutablePtr and TStructView/TConstStructView::GetPtr crashing when the underlying struct data is incompatible with BaseStructT",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This will now ensure instead, though will still perform the bad cast in a shipping build, so any ensures need to be fixed!",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed TStringView::CopyString for copying an empty range.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix a missing test of MaybeWaitingFlag in FManualResetEvent before parking the thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Algo::RemoveIf calling the predicate too many times in some cases, and added some tests.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Rehashed map and set properties after instancing key subobjects in their overrides of FProperty::InstanceSubobjects.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled AutoSDK for LowLevelTests targets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix thread scheduler to properly apply the cvars TaskGraph.UseDynamicPrioritization, TaskGraph.UseDynamicThreadCreation, and TaskGraph.OversubscriptionRatio which can be used to modify thread performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adding -nocrashreports support for windows. When provided, we will log crashes/ensures/etc but will not perform more complex reporting that could risk hanging on a file pipe.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reimplemented TVectorRegisterType with partial specializations rather than std::conditional_t to work around alignment issue using Clang on Windows.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled custom property lists during native struct serialization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a race waking threads in FSharedMutex and FSharedRecursiveMutex.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added workaround for getting an array reference element from an rvalue tuple under MSVC.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated Alignment in TStaticArray and fixed UB behavior in it's GetData. Made TArrayView and Invoke constexpr.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated TSortedMap::GetMaxIndex, fixed TSortedSet::GetMaxIndex and correctly commented TSet::GetMaxIndex and TMap::GetMaxIndex.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated public and protected ways of initializing TStringBuilderBase from a buffer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated member TFunction::CheckCallable which was never intended to be public.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated TIsConst.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated PLATFORM_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_CONSTEXPR_BUILTIN_FILE_AND_LINE.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Replaced bExactClass with EFindObjectFlags in the FindObject family of functions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated the original log template API.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Delete FCbFieldIterator::MakeOwned() to avoid breaking the iterator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Dev Tools",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added compile warning argument ordering.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Wildcard support in project sections of UGS ini files.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved the summary outputs of UnrealPak. The units of memory now scale with the number of bytes making it easier to read for both smaller and larger containers.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UBT DefaultBuildSettings:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Build Settings V6 now applied to wundef.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Default Build Settings Updates for Targets - V6 - engine.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "BuildCMakeLib: Added support for building third-party projects with CMake using the Ninja build system.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adding capabilities to the warning defaults, cleaning up tests, adding more warning+error strings for easier long term adoption & toggling.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UHT will flag U macros (i.e. UCLASS) found in skipped blocks of code as deprecated. This will be made a warning in a future version of UE.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UBT Editor: Added graceful messaging for Target upgrade requirements on editor path.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Emit the target build settings version & build environment to target file for editor runtime consumption.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Consume target file metadata to improve error messaging for Target versions.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixing a bug where UAT could hang waiting for output. We now log a warning instead.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Shaders: Fixed the shader pipeline skipping work if the number of shaders to compile is less than the number of tasks available.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where if a TInstancedStruct is used as a function argument, Clang platforms would fail to compile.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed BuildCookRun to include base build .sig files when generating patches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updating UHT to once again generate an error when a USTRUCT contains more than one base.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue in UnrealVS that could cause UnrealVS.P4-&gt;History to open an empty window",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated UnrealVS - Includes fixes to test discovery and execution",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Corrected define usage (UE_BUILD_SHIPPING vs UE_SHIPPING)",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UHT parser issue where if FArchive is forward declared when used in the Serialize function declaration, UHT would fail to generate the proper code.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed inconsistent exception logging in Gauntlet.TestExecutor. It now consistently uses Exception.ToString().",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issue in UHT where it was allowing a USTRUCT to have multiple USTRUCTs as base classes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug where presets would be added to the global sync filters if the tab with the preset had its sync filter view opened and the okay button pressed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UGS not showing investigations as \"resolved\" when using Horde's metadata endpoint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed destination files potentially not having the correct permission during SafeCopyFile in UAT, on non-Windows platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Horde",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "BuildHealth Server Build: Added JobSummary telemetry.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Hashed issue handler will now automatically check for a file property in the event's structured logging, and use that data in suspect finding. This should lead to suspect changes being identified more accurately, but relies on emitted warnings and errors including file metadata.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Analytics:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a Build Health Dashboard View that shows step outcome history for selected templates & streams.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Add ExternalIssueKey & Fingerprint to the telemetry payload for issues. Also includes AnalyticsIntegrationTests.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added example of implementing a new Secrets Provider for Azure Key Vault. This secret provider is experimental and provided as an example of how to implement a custom secret provider.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Secrets plugin configuration option WithAws that controls if the AwsParameterStore provider is enabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added new Secrets API api/v1/secrets/resolve/ that resolves a string to a property value of a secret. For example the string horde:secret:SecretName.PropertyName would resolve to the value of PropertyName for the secret SecretName.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Only commits with Code CommitTag are considered when searching for Compile issue suspects.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed the unused Password property from EpicGames.Horde.Streams.IWorkspaceType.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the attribute ResolveSecret that allows properties in the Global Config to be resolved to the value of a Horde secret during configuration load.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "If the property's value is of the form horde:secret:SecretName.PropertyName then if a secret SecretName exists and has a property PropertyName it will be replaced with the value from the Horde secret.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This allows sensitive configuration properties to move out of the configuration files to an external secrets provider such as AWS or HashiCorp Vault.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "New: Updated the Password and Ticket properties for the Build Config's PerforceCredentials property to use the attribute ResolveSecret allowing Perforce credentials to be moved to an external secret provider.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed build graph updates where a node that is skipped but modified does not fail the whole build. This allows the build to continue with only dependent nodes being marked as skipped while non-dependent subtrees can continue to run.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Replaced the deprecated code coverage tool JetBrains.dotCover.GlobalTool with JetBrains.dotCover.CommandLineTools.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added to the Stream Config a StreamTags property, which is a set of name and Boolean pairs; and to the Schedule Config a Condition property.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The Condition property can be used instead of the Enabled property to control if the scheduled jobs for a stream should be enabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Each stream tag will have an environment variable named after it with the UE_HORDE_STREAMTAG_ prefix and a value of True or False, which can be used in BuildGraph script conditions.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where capabilities for agents was missing their RAM capacity.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated Temp Storage to allow the maximum number of exports to write in a single request to be configurable from the agent settings. The new option is TempStorageMaxBatchSize and defaults to a value of 20. Modified from contrib .",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "API encounters \".NET type System.Text.Json.JsonElement cannot be mapped to a BsonValue\" on swagger API invocations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where GetNext for ScheduledDowntime would return the previous downtime.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where the log for the Downtime Service would print the next downtime being in the past when an expired non-repeating downtime was in the global config.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Server Tests: Fix the DatabaseIntegrationTest class to properly forward dispose calls to the mongoDBRunner.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "BuildHealth Server: Exposed DateUtc on GetCommitResponse.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where capabilities for macOS agents was missing information for:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "CPU number of logical cores.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "CPU performance and efficiency cores for Apple Silicon.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GPU name and core count.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "User name, domain name and running as administrator.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where the Notices Get method would not return the start and finish times, and if the start and finish times are set then set the active value accordingly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Insights",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adds pre and post state change callbacks for TraceLog channels. Allows instrumentations to deny state changes and provide a reason for the denial, as well as performing actions when a channel is enabled or disabled, such as sending initial state, resetting tracked state or activating tracking.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a method of creating a TraceAnalysis session using a custom data stream.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an ability to copy a tooltip value to clipboard from the bookmarks track.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The PlatformEvents channel now uses callbacks to deny enabling channels and provide user feedback, if requirements are not fulfilled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support to save data traced via the Direct Trace mode to disk. FDirectSocketStream can now accept an optional FArchiveFileWriterGeneric used to write the data to disk.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for Frame Start and End Misc Trace events in the minimal trace API.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added config variables to provide variable trace log write buffer size and prevent writer sleeping. This helps prevent the write thread from getting saturated under heavy load.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Increased version of Unreal Insights to v1.08, for the UE 5.7 Release.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved management of TraceLog worker thread in various scenarios. The worker thread can now be started on demand.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a startup deadlock when launching with -trace=memory without tracehost or tracefile.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where FTraceAuxiliary::Relay did not respect the Options parameter provided.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue due to Trace gap detection using three sync points. Previous logic used two sync points to calculate gaps, but the engine sends out three. In some scenarios this caused an error in gap detection which meant a higher serial was chosen as the next serial. This would leave much of the trace data unprocessed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Framework",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "AI",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where selecting subnodes would result in the currently-edited property value to be discarded instead of applied.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "AI Behavior Trees",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed reinstantiation for Blueprint-based nodes using blackboard key selector.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Blueprint reinstantiation issues with some BehaviorTree types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "AAIController::UseBlackboard: Fixed to correctly return the result of trying to initialize the Blackboard.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed InstanceIdx to use a const int32 to prevent a need for IntCastChecked to prevent possible data truncation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "AI Debugging",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added possibility in Rewind Debugger tracks to override the default behavior to step backward and step forward commands.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "VisualLogger log entry initialization can now also assign a valid location for components. With this change, double-clicking on such an entry will bring the camera to that location instead of the world's origin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed GameplayDebugger local-multiplayer render duplication.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed ever growing buffer in FVisualLoggerBinaryFileDevice when VisualLogger is not set to record to file.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed debug draw helper functions and SmartObject visualization to properly handle scaled DPI.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "AI EQS",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "EnvQueryTest_GameplayTags: Added searching for tags container in actor's components if actor itself doesn't implement IGameplayTagAssetInterface.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Upgraded the description details of the UEnvQueryTest_Pathfinding test to better reflect its behavior in EEnvTestPurpose::Score mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed blueprint reinstantiation for EQS types",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "AI Navigation",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "NavLink Generation:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a name property to generation configs, and JumpMaxDepth can now be negative.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Activated the \"enable\" property now that multiple configurations are supported.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added multiple link configurations for generated navlinks.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added LinkGenerationSelectedConfig to debug a specific config.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
