                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Defaulting to pre-blended benefited a few cases, but also caused visual bugs in a couple of other cases, so it's not worth turning it on by default.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Moved persistent rig activation functions onto the camera components and the camera manager.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "These Blueprint functions were previously global, affecting whatever camera system host was currently considered \"active\".",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "This turns out to be unclear and prone to errors. Now the user activates persistent rigs exactly on whatever they intend to.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now auto-create camera rigs and assets when nothing is specified on a Gameplay Camera component (but log a warning).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made the orientation initialization service available to 3rd parties, and added an API for overriding the target or yaw/pitch to preserve.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a Blueprint utility function to access the evaluated camera's orientation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added Teardown API for node evaluators, added layer and active camera rig information.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Made node evaluator and evaluation service flags inclusive by default (i.e. opt-out).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added a new \"initialize with ideal framing\" option on screen-space framing nodes.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a \"family shortcut\" bar to various camera asset editors for helping navigate between related assets.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Users can now set variables to be pre-blended.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made QoL improvements to the Blueprint camera node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added bone/socket options to the attach to player pawn node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improved advanced camera shakes (add shake instance IDs and the ability to interrupt and stop a shake), improved the internal API for implementing shake nodes, and fixed a few bugs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Implemented a more proper auto-build for camera assets for PIE.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "GAS:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improved logging for missing attributes in FActiveGameplayEffectHandle when using GetGameplayEffectMagnitude.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Gameplay Tag display ends in an ellipsis when the display is cut off rather than overflowing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Gameplay Tag and Tag Container meta data \"DisplayShortTagNames\" will now remove the Categories filter from the beginning of the Tag chip in the details panel.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Gameplay Effects stacking options now have better names and comments.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "CooldownGameplayEffectClass validation: When a GameplayAbility is configured with a cooldown GE class, validation will check whether that GE applies any tags.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated the GameplayTagCountContainer to serialize tags itself and provide for fine control of what tags should replicate where via EGameplayTagReplicationState enum.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Exposing common GameplayEffectSpecHandle and ActiveGameplayEffectHandle queries to Blueprint. The following Blueprint callable functions have been added to AbilitySystemBlueprintLibrary to empower Blueprint programmers when making GameplayAbilities. Since some GameplayAbilityTask callbacks only provide a GE spec handle and/or active GE handle, now you can do more with those handles:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "GetGrantedTags: Gets gameplay tags granted by a Gameplay Effect, from the effect's spec handle.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "GetAssetTags: Gets gameplay tags describing the GameplayEffect, from the effect's spec handle.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "GetGameplayEffectFromSpecHandleIsDurationGameplayEffectSpecHandle: Whether a GameplayEffect is instant or non-instant.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "IsActiveGameplayEffectHandleValid: Whether a handle for an active GameplayEffect is a valid handle or not. Applied instant GEs don't result in an active handle.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "IsActiveGameplayEffectHandleActive: Whether a handle for an active GameplayEffect is a valid handle and it's still applied.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "GetAbilitySystemComponentFromActiveGameplayEffectHandle: Retrieving the AbilitySystemComponent from an active GE handle.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Renaming a gameplay tag in the Gameplay Tag Manager now automatically renames all sub tags.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added predictive gameplay effect stacking and improved stack overflow handling.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The data validation error for when there is a null input trigger on a key mapping now includes the name of the input action which it is mapped to.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "You can now call \"SetShouldConsume\" on any Enhanced Input bound action handles.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "You can also define \"ENHANCED_INPUT_ALLOW_LEGACY_BINDING\" in your game's .build.cs file to enable legacy key bindings onto enhanced input components, making upgrading to enhanced input easier.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added GetActorFilter UPROPERTY meta support to object picker (mirroring GetAssetFilter).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a virtual function to UBlueprint, ShouldAutomaticallyRegisterInputOnConstruction, which can be overridden in widget blueprints.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a set of deprecated input action/axis names in the project settings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added \"Setter=SetShowMouseCursor\" to APlayerController::bShowMouseCursor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added ReleaseGameFeaturePlugins for multiple plugins at once. Unloading plugins batches GC and GameplayTags tree changes together which improves performance of unloading operation",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an editor preference for setting a \"Simulated Device Mapping Policy\".",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This can be used in the editor to change how input devices get mapped to platform users, which can be useful for testing device connection sequences for your UI, log in flows, etc.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added the current device mapping policy to the output of the \"Input.LogAllConnectedDevices\" command.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added helper functions to Ability system library: HasAnyAbilitiesWithCondition and HasAnyAbilitiesWithAssetTag",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added QueueWorkFunction and SendQueuedWork to the TaskSyncManager which can be used to queue a batch of function pointers to execute as a simple tick task. This can be used with RegisterTickGroupWorkHandle to safely schedule batched gameplay thread work from any worker thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Calling GetDeviceSpecificData now uses the given input device ID. If that is invalid, it uses the platform user's most recent device.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added LoadGameIfExistsAsync to SaveGameSystem which combines the exists and load checks into one async call to avoid an extra frame delay. Changed GameplayStatics to use this for async loads which fixes a warning when trying to load a nonexistent save game.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added ensure and comments to prevent creation of registered FTickableGameObjects on worker threads which is an unsafe race condition.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option to the FTickableGameObject constructor to enable creating with a disabled tick, which is safe on a worker thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added bindable \"virtual\" accept and back FKeys.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a OnPostUserSettingsInitialized delegate to Enhanced Input, which will fire after the Enhanced Input User Settings have been initialized on the subsystem.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added more ways to detect a local player subsystem when using the node which does not have an explicit player controller target pin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implemented SlideAlongNavMesh option for CMC NavWalking mode. This means pawns in NavWalking mode can move along a navmesh rather than just moving towards a projected point on the navmesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "CineCamera: Added an option to disable dynamic exposure.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Previously, turning off depth-of-field with FocusMethod would also turn off exposure simulation. This was fixed recently, but also meant that CineCameraComponent would now always simulate exposure, which isn't always desirable.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This change adds a new ExposureMethod setting to allow disabling exposure too.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made sure that the key mappings \"supported key profile\" tag is respected, and made the OnKeyProfileChanged delegate Blueprint assignable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a race condition crash on shutdown of the SteamController plugin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an \"Input.LogAllConnectedDevices\" command to dump all the currently connected input devices and some metadata about them to the logs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reduced mouse input overhead on Windows by processing raw mouse moves on a separate FRunnable thread in the WindowsApplication..",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "GameplayTags and GameplayTagContainers created in Blueprint give the user a way to edit the \"Categories\" metadata for tag filtering in the owning Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash where UPlayerInput::SmoothMouse would assert before it would attempt to divide by zero.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mover:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a bug in mover angular velocity clamping where the limit was not respected when rotating off axis",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added CommonLegacyMovementSettings shared settings in various movement modes to avoid a crash that could happen if they were the only mode added.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where pawns wouldn't follow a navlink off the navmesh if bSlideAlongNavMeshEdge was true.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Nav walking modes now force a navmesh projection if something comes along and invalidates our last floor information, such as teleportation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now initialize the Mover mode state machine earlier so it can be used in backend initialization if desired",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed NaN issue in UMovementUtils::ComputeVelocity that could happen when MoveDirectionIntent was zeroed out.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed issue where backends could leave stale non-persistent structs in sync state between frames.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed several cases where strict equality checks on orientations could fail due to float point imprecision.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where a specified InputProducer could fail to have ProduceInput called on it.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a Blueprint editor crash during validation if there's a shared settings object set to None.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed issues with trying to maintain the small distance off of floors in falling/flying modes where a character could get pulled towards the floor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed improperly calculated angular velocity for mutli-axis rotation cases, and added utility function to compute it.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a bug in standalone mode where the time step was being rounded down to the nearest whole millisecond.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed floating point precision error in mover's fixed delta time calculation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Finding a movement modifier by handle and by type now searches through the queued modifiers on the Mover State Machine as well. Fixes an issue where modifiers weren't found immediately after queuing them.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed local-&gt;world root motion conversions when non-yaw rotations are involved.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed cases where some movement modes were not respecting the setting for remaining vertical.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed bugs where an actor can violate the min/max distance it's supposed to float above walkable floors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made sure we use BaseVisualComponentTransform to update PrimaryVisualComponent transform in FinalizeFrame so changes to BaseVisualComponentTransform apply to the visual component regardless of whether we're smoothing state or not.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now properly expose Movement Mode in-out references in GenerateMove and SimulationTick to Blueprint.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Searching modifiers by handle with an invalid handle will return nullptr rather than active modifiers with invalid handles that haven't been fixed up yet.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now passing along starting velocity in Falling modes if we didn't use any time. This fixes some velocity cancellation that sometimes causes a stutter on landing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cameras:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed main camera assets not being usable as Blueprint variables.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed crashes and bugs with rewind debugger integration.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improve debug info display with extra data, more filtering options, and a few other things.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed single-rig updates missing some of the steps the blend stack does.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed static initialization problems that can lead to debug blocks not saving their fields in trace files.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer freezes camera rigs during stateless evaluations.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer warns about a camera asset not using any rigs if it's using proxies, and builds any rigs in the proxy table.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when a camera's enter or exit transitions have empty pins.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an incorrect reset-to-default behavior on the camera parameter editor UI.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now prevents infinite recursion when there's a cyclic reference of camera rigs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed gameplay tag transition condition; when a tag query is specified, it should fail if there is no previous/next camera rig.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Normalized yaw/pitch for spline orbit node",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Can now run the target ray-cast node when there's no player controller.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Can now build and run camera rigs and shakes with no root node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now prevent rig prefab nodes referencing their own camera rig.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer throws asserts or error messages when we have a camera actor without an asset specified on it",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed activating persistent rigs during director initialization, and having these rigs receive custom parameter overrides.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now validates that exposed camera rig parameters have the correct type for what they're connected to.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed possible crash in GPC camera manager when the last evaluation context is removed from the stack.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer updates dampers and interpolators when the delta-time is zero.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now properly freeze blends (possibly mid-blending) when freezing a camera rig in a blend stack.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed simple fixed-time blends not saving/restoring their current time.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when changing the type of a camera rig parameter.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer shows byte/int types for data parameters.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now resolves camera rig name conflicts when building the property bag for a camera asset.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed camera rig parameter nodes not being added to the list of graph objects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed assert when adding an enum data parameter to a camera rig.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed broken \"inline\" evaluation of camera shake prefabs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer pre-blends camera variable table entries that are not flagged for it.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed the tick group for the camera components.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when running editor builds without an editor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added missing initialization call for blend nodes in merged camera rigs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The camera reference widget is now disabled if overridden with a rig parameter.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when connecting a camera variable reference to a camera rig parameter.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where rigs could keep running with old data after their asset was rebuilt.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed \"Home\" button in camera rig editor.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Deleted references to camera variables when a variable collection is deleted.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a possible crash when running with unbuilt or outdated rigs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed Blueprint breakpoints not working on GET/SET parameter nodes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed shake prefab node not passing shake parameter values over to the visual layer in deferred mode.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed SET parameters nodes not setting anything if the parameter wasn't already known in the variable/data tables.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed error messages for unexpected situations lerping/overriding variable tables.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed variable and context data tables sometimes returning uninitialized memory, and replace assert with one-time warning.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer uses manual focus distance on the output camera component if the focus distance isn't set.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed pin types and colors for some data parameters.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed incorrect parameter/pin types on the Blueprint camera node for object and class pointers.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Camera modifier rigs added from the player camera manager should now be aware of the player controller.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added fixes for the player camera manager:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "No longer double-updates Gameplay Camera actors",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Now run the vanilla (Blueprint-based) camera modifiers ourselves after the camera system.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Now sets the transform of the camera manager itself to where the final viewpoint is.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "GAS:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Consolidated code that checks whether an AttributeSet's FProperty represents a gameplay attribute, and improved coverage and stability:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "FGameplayAttribute details customization dropdown will only show attribute set properties that represent GameplayAttributes. Previously it showed all properties.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "GameplayDebugger will now also display doubles. Doubles as FGameplayAttributes remain supported for legacy reasons.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed GameplayDebugger crash when an UAttributeSet had any int32 UPROPERTY().UAttributeSet::InitFromMetaDataTable now only processes property types that can back gameplay attributes.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when debugging gameplay effects with aggregate by source stacks.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed an issue where SetTagMapCount didn't call OnTagUpdated like the other tag update functions. This will now be called when Gameplay Cue tags and Loose Tags are added and removed (No change for changing values that don't add or remove the tag).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed target data recalculating source tags and attributes when applying Effect Spec.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GameInstance pointer for Async Actions is correctly reset after it is un-registered.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Network Prediction: Changed static initialization of FNetworkPredictionModelDefRegistry's singleton to avoid issues with static initialization happening out of order causing registered Network Prediction model definitions to be skipped/removed. Also, made some minor adjustments to FNetworkPredictionModelDefRegistry::FinalizeTypes to avoid potential ODR issues.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an error in ULocalPlayerSaveGame::IsSaveInProgress where it always returned true even if one was not in progress.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an ensure to protect against missing player state crashes during seamless travel.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Map placed actor Event Dispatcher duplicates:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "A map placed Blueprint actor's bindings to another map placed actor's multicast delegates (including Event Dispatchers) are now cleaned up when the actor is destroyed and reinstanced.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes a bug that bindings to other actors' multicast delegates accumulate when recompiling an actor blueprint. Previously this resulted in event nodes firing multiple times, increasingly when the Blueprint is recompiled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now return the playercontroller if found from the owner.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Network Prediction: fixed crash in smoothing service that could occur after adding more simulation objects during runtime",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed replication issue canceling Gameplay Abilities when destroying the ASC from the server while abilities are active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Multiply (Compound) modifiers not calculating correctly with stacked GameplayEffects.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Prevented a crash in APlayerCameraManager when the owning player controller has been GC'ed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Input triggers and modifiers will now properly respect the priority of an input mapping context. This fixes a bug where if you had the same input modifier class on an input mapping context of a different priority, it would always use the modifier values of the one which was pushed to the stack first.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed code that removes ?listen from client URLs to work correctly with # options as well.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured that the \"SlateApp.GetModifierKeys\" function will return the correct values when called on platforms using GameInput to process keyboards.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed OnBlendComplete not being broadcast in Standalone (non-networked) games.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Find-in-Blueprints: When a BP member variable is a struct, its members' default values are now searched and returned as results. Map keys are not supported yet.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Chaos Mover: Fixed floating point precision error in ChaosMoverStateMachines's fixed delta time calculation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer restarts a camera animation blend out when reaching the blend out time if we were already stopping.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed DefaultToInstanced subobjects breaking on blueprint duplication.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed instanced subobjects, including DefaultToInstanced classes and UPROPERTY(Instanced), breaking when a blueprint class with instanced subobjects got duplicated.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This fixes the following editor actions which previously resulted in data loss:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Duplicating blueprints with user defined instanced subobjects.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Duplicating blueprints with GAS attribute set DefaultSubobjects.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Player Input: Fixed a bug where if you had an input component whose outer was a subobject of the currently controlled pawn, the input component would be processed twice.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "One example where this could be a common issue is within the \"Modular Gameplay Framework\". Users would add a UInputComponent to some UActorComponent, and then call \"PushInputComponent\" on the owning player controller. This would result in the UInputComponent being processed twice.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This would happen because in \"APlayerController::BuildInputStack\" it calls \"GetComponents\" on the controlled pawn, which would return the UInputComponent which had already been pushed to the controller's input stack, thus adding it twice to the stack for processing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enhanced Input: Do not load platform-specific override data on post load of the platform settings. If you are referencing an object that is in a plugin, this will just fail anyway and does not improve any sort of loading behavior.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an incorrect Deleter being used on FGameplayAbilityTargetData when calling FilterTargetData, and exposed FGameplayAbilityTargetDataDeleter for this purpose.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Use this deleter when creating an FGameplayAbilityTargetData using FMalloc, such as in UAbilitySystemBlueprintLibrary::FilterTargetData.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "When creating TSharedPtr to FGameplayAbilityTargetData which was created with FMemory::Malloc, please use the FGameplayAbilityTargetDataDeleter",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated the \"Speech Mappings\". These speech mappings were originally added to support Hololens, which is no longer a supported platform and can be removed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed the deprecated functions on the camera manager, GetCameraCachePOV and GetLastFrameCameraCachePOV.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "GAS: Deprecated StackType to make it private in the future, use new accessors instead.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Mass",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added time-slicing with FMassEntityQuery::FExecutionLimiter to limit execution to a set entity count.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Mass command for grouping entities.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mass Debugger:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added \"Open In Query Editor\" button to all query displays in the debugger.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added handle-based sorting of entities on the Entities tab.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Completely overhauled breakpoints with new types, filtering, hit counters, session to session persistence, copy-paste.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added query editor UI with load/save and copy/paste support for authored queries.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added Fragments view tab.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added new \"Selected Entity\" breakpoint filter to break for whichever entity is selected in the gameplay debugger or debug UI.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FMassFragmentRequirements and FMassEntityQuery are no longer UStructs, which they were never supposed to be.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added observers locking to commands flushing. This change results in batching observers calls, significantly reducing the number of individual observers executions (~20 times in CitySample).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added MassQueryExecutor to unify the functions of MassQuery and MassProcessor and create a foundation to remove dependency on UObjects for Mass processing in the future.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Simplified Mass data access with templated UE::Mass:FAccessors collection.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a way to fetch base-typed fragment views from Execution context while providing the actual, specific class with a UScriptStruct pointer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "CFragment concept now checks whether types are std::is_trivially_copyable and if not emits errors requiring users to manually mark fragment types that are not trivially copyable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The goal is to educate fragment creators about good practices and point out fragments that might accidentally violate the requirement.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated FMassBatchedCommand::Execute as a const function and introduced non-const replacement named `Run`.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Unfortunately a new name had to be introduced since the constness of the function is the only thing that's changing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a temporary construct to MassCommandBuffer to statically detect commands that still implement the deprecated virtual Execute in an attempt to make it easier for people updating their code to notice the change.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The construct will check at compile time all the pushed commands of known types and statically assert if the command type still overrides the deprecated `Execute` function.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Entity Builder API extension, supporting use of an arbitrary \"element\" type and having the builder figure out what kind of an element that is and store it appropriately. Additional changes:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed FEntityBuilder::AddInternal implementation to not add duplicated instances of a given element type if one is already present.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added creation context to the deferred path, to ensure the fragment values are already set when the observers kick in. This was already done in the synchronous path, so this change addresses the inconsistency",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a couple of functions to MassEntityManager, that deal with types passed in as UScriptStruct, and pass the argument to the appropriate function, based on the type (Tag or Fragment).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mass Command Buffer API extension:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "PushUniqueCommand: the function lets callers add a hand-crafted command. Use it to push commands that you don't want to get merged with other commands of the same type.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "AddTag and RemoveTag: added versions that take an array view of entity handles.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "DestroyEntities: Added a version with rvalue ref parameter.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added FMassFragmentRequirements::AddElementRequirement that can be called at runtime with UScriptStruct.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "It will add the provided type to Fragment or Tag bitsets, depending on the type represented.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added FMassRepresentationParameters::Identical to implement logically-correct FMassRepresentationParameters instances comparison. The operation by design ignores CachedDefaultRepresentationType and CachedRepresentationActorManagement.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a way to ask a MassCommandBuffer about its host thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UMassVisualizationTrait can now be configured to not check mesh descriptions for validity which can be used to procedurally populate trait instances.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed inconsistencies between single and multi-threaded deferred command flushing in FMassProcessingPhase::ExecuteTick.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Modified the occasionally failing ensure condition in UInstancedActorsData::OnInstancedActorDestroyed and provided it with more comments and a message to emit.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Properly handle shared fragment hash collisions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mass puppet actors now get destroyed immediately when the puppet is destroyed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed configuration issues of FMassProcessingContext created in UMassSpawnerSubsystem::DoSpawning for running initializer processors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The original configuration was flushing commands if any have been issued, but did so in a way that forced flushing of all the system's commands accumulated up until that point. That resulted in different behavior in entity spawning depending on whether there were initializers for a given entity available or not.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The new configuration results in keeping the behavior consistent, regardless of initializers presence, which is to not flush commands and if any are issued they will be appended to the main buffer when FMassProcessingContext goes out of scope.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
