```json
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "MassGameplay:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when a mass representation actor is destroyed while mass simulation is active.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a teardown crash in MassAgentComponent.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a situational crash in UMassRepresentationSubsystem on world teardown.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "MassAgentComponent changes to update EntityHandle-to-actor mapping in MassActorSubsystem when dealing with a player-owned component.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The change fixes an issue with GameplayDebugger's Mass category not being able to display info on the player-owned entity. A tiny change to the category removes the friction when doing that (no longer requiring the transform fragment to display data).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue in FMassEntityQuery::ParallelForEachEntityChunk stemming from the code not taking into consideration that ParallelForEach's workers can be moved between threads.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "If that happened and the query was run with `bAllowParallelCommands == true`, then the command buffer would complain about being used outside of the thread of its creation. The fix is updating the thread ID of the command buffer whenever it's picked up.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now sorting observer processors to utilize UMassProcessor.ExecutionPriority.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed FarmTest to not crash on PIE:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The existing implementation is crashing since the changes to processor initialization have not been applied there.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This issue is limited to the farm-test, due to the custom and legacy way of setting up and running processors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed standalone-game IA uses by properly talking to ServerInstancedActorsSpawnerSubsystem, which fixes some IA representation issues.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also, ServerInstancedActorsSpawnerSubsystem has been fixed to `FinishSpawning` actors only once their IAComponent has been configured.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Marked UMassCapsuleTransformToMassTranslator as \"game-thread only\" to avoid data races when the observed component is modified in game thread as the data is being accessed by the processor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Networking",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Implemented RPC state stomp detection which can detect state buffer writes between quantization and serialization. The cvar to control this is net.Iris.RPC.ServerStompDetectionEnabled which is false by default.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Support Iris when using NMT_JoinNoPawn and NMT_JoinNoPawnSplit.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adding an FSocket::ReleaseNativeSocket for use with native socket API's (e.g. asio). Using this new function inside the TraceAnalysis' FDirectSocketStream to support cases where we want multiple connections, not just a single connection (e.g. a multi-server capture).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Iris",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Implemented seamless travel support. If seamless travel support is not needed for a project the cvar net.Iris.AlwaysCreateLevelFilteringGroupsForPersistentLevels can be set to false to avoid unnecessary overhead of filtering objects in the persistent level.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Optimized polling to only poll objects/properties that are marked dirty.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added some async loading failure debugging cvars:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "net.Iris.AsyncLoading.FailPackageName Name: fails async loading all packages containing the package name.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "net.Iris.AsyncLoading.FailNextLoad 1: fails the next async load regardless of the name and resets the cvar.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "net.Iris.AsyncLoading.FailAllLoads 1: fails all loads until the cvar is set to 0.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Gracefully handle reaching the end of the bitstream even if it's unexpected. The behavior is controlled via cvar net.Iris.ReplicationReader.GracefullyHandleReachingEndOfBitstream.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added better logging when handling end of bitstream issues. Reset the read journal when deserializing huge objects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a NetDriver command for printing out all of the actors registered for replication (generic replication system only).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "NetEmulation:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added netEmulation setting to simulate buffer bloat on game traffic.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Set PktBufferBloatInMS for outgoing packets and PktIncomingBufferBloatInMS for incoming packets.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Ex: 'netEmulatation.PktBufferBloatInMS 1000' will apply 1sec of buffer bloat on outgoing traffic.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "netEmulation.BufferBloatCooldownTimeInMS can also be used to set a cooldown period between each buffer bloat occurence.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Ex: 'netEmulation.BufferBloatCooldownTimeInMS 2000' means buffer bloat is not applied for 2secs after a buffer flush.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a \"BufferBloat\" emulation profile that enables buffer bloat of 400ms (in and out) over an 'average' emulation profile.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added metrics to measure the performance and behavior of the multiserver proxy.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Multithreaded Iris Polling Step:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "FObjectPoller can now kick off multiple FReplicationPollTasks, each of which processes a subset of the ObjectsConsideredForPolling array.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This is set to process cache line sized Chunks in an interleaved pattern so that each task gets a roughly balanced amount of work, and we avoid false sharing the same cache line.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also supports the ForcePoll flow if PushModel is disabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added NetBitArray ForAllSetBitsInRange function to facilitate iterating over different parts of the same Array inside each task.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "FNetTypeStats now supports threaded access through the use of ChildNetStatsContexts that are used during parallel phases and then accumulated into the parent context at the end of a frame.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Configuration is done at the ReplicationSystem level so that we can enable it just for GameNetDriver on the Server.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "We define a flag called bIsInParallelPhase which is true whilst the FReplicationPollTasks are running, and is used to protect against non-thread-safe access during this time.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added capability for Networking Iris Polling phase to be run in parallel. This can be enabled by adding bAllowParallelTasks=true to the ReplicationSystemConfig",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "MultiServer:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Refactored LaunchMultiServer script. Users can now derive from it to add their own features.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The -ProxyGameServers command-line argument can now accept a port range. This helps with launching multiple servers on a single host, so you can just use 127.0.0.1:9001-9025 for 25 servers.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "RemoteObjects: Now reschedules aborted ServerReplicateActor calls rather than retrying them.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where UActorChannel::ReplicateActor did not account written bits in one of the paths",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Renamed RepNotifies CSV stat to Generic_RepNotifies to better distinguish between Actor Channel based replication (generic) and Iris replication.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for closing child connections in the net driver and closing connections on the multiserver proxy.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added mutators to UNetworkMetricsDatabase functionality.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Mutators can be added to UNetworkMetricsBaseListener and get a chance to process input metrics every frame. They report an output metric to their owning listener on the listener's reporting interval.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Use mutators to aggregate metrics that are set more frequently than a listener's reporting interval. Basic mutators for min, max, and average are provided.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added server-side network metrics for RawPing values across all client connections.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for actor replication relevancy when using the multiserver proxy.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The multiserver proxy now shares a single NetGUID cache and objects are cached on the proxy when migrating between servers.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash which could occur if an actor channel was removed during replay playback scrubbing.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Iris:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed bug with FastArraySerialzierFragment if using not replicating items.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed bug where FGameplayAbilityTargetingLocationInfoNetSerializer would not properly call FreeDynamicState.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed bug that could prevent a default subobject from receiving a large RPC.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fix edge case with prioritization causing a crash.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed issue where dirty status of new subobjects created from PreUpdate of objects was masked out.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now resets NetBitStreamReader between batches to get correct read journal entries and clear overflow status.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "ObjectProperty class type is now validated property when serializing object references.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a bug where initial state was not applied when beginplay() was dispatched for world from AGameStateBase::OnRep_ReplicatedHasBegunPlay.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a bug that allowed adding subobjects to torn off root objects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "FScriptInterfaceNetSerializer can now handle blueprint implemented interfaces.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The ObjectReplicationBridge's AddDependentObject method will now prevent circular dependencies.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed bitstream corruption that could lead to disconnects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can now pass zero size to FNetBitStreamWriter's InitBytes method.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Network:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added UE_FAST_ARRAY_COMPILE_LOG_LEVEL that enables a program to control the compile time verbosity of LogNetFastTArray logs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Since this class is templated the logs in the functions are unique per implemented class so it can grow the amount of the log static strings if they are left compiled-in.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issue with FObjectReplicator's CanSkipUpdate with net.PushModelSkipUndirtiedReplication enabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made a change in UNetDriver::IsLevelInitializedForActor to avoid iterating over net connections if the actor we are evaluating has the correct world, or if the actor it is not a player controller",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "NetDriver:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed ping updates discarding higher ping values when multiple Acks were received in one packet.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "For example this caused ping values to stay low during BufferFloat occurrences.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added RawPing metric that tracks the highest ping value received every frame.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "RawPing will not change if no packets are received or the incoming packets contain no new Acks.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When using Iris replication, objects that have a spatial filter set at runtime will now always use their correct location for filtering calculations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "When using Iris replication, actors and subclasses without explicit FilterConfig overrides in ObjectReplicationBridgeConfig will now be filtered based on their relevancy flags like bAlwaysRelevant.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Previously these actors were treated as always relevant regardless of their bAlwaysRelevant flag.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed error prone SetConnectionFilter API from UReplicationSystem. Use exclusion groups instead.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deleted UNopNetObjectFilter. It's been superseded by UAlwaysRelevantNetObjectFilter which has identical functionality.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated GetSubobjectsWithStableNamesForNetworking function",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "gXrR",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}
```

```json
{
  "type": "include",
  "excerpt_id": 2535,
  "excerpt_assignment_id": 2066,
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Level Design and Art Tools",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Geometry Core",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We now use the fast cluster simplifier for convex decomposition's pre-pass simplifier (since the main use case is to make the decomposition faster).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Geometry Core: Added morph target attribute as a core dynamic mesh vertex attribute.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added path intersection & difference.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a ReparameterizedCloserToWorldFrame to the GeometryCore TOrientedBox3 class.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a CreatePerVertex method to dynamic mesh overlays, as a faster alternative to the CreateFromPredicate() method in the per-vertex case.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a vertex -&gt; single triangle method to dynamic mesh, as a faster/more-convenient path (vs e.g. using a vertex-&gt;triangles iterator to get a single element).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FDynamicMesh3 queries now optionally take an inline-allocated array for local vertex-neighborhood mesh queries.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added optional scale factor to DynamicMeshUVEditor::ScaleUVAreaTo3DArea utility function.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added option for geometrycore's MeshBoolean to report the source mesh of each result triangle.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added option for the Mesh Boolean to take a custom 'inside mesh' function, per mesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "[GeometryCore] Delaunay 2D iterative update support.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a version of Expand() to FAxisAlignedBox3 and FAxisAlignedBox2 that takes a vector.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Segment Tree: - add option to build the tree with an array of segments - make use of the filter function that's passed in as an option.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We now reset the UsedCount on a moved-from RefCountVector, so it is left in a valid state (and e.g. a mesh will not fail CheckValidity after being moved from).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made the implicit morphology generator not hit an ensure() when passed an empty mesh (and still return an empty result).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the dynamic mesh color transfer method handling of non-compact meshes when biasing element positions, and simplified the lerp-toward-centroid logic used.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed static mesh's LOD -&gt; dynamic mesh conversion handling of non-compact polygon group IDs",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "We need to compact these IDs so that they correspond to static mesh section indices, which all our tools and geometry script processing expect.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved performance of MeshRegionGraph operations:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Region merging transfers known neighbor information, rather than recomputing it.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Less redundant validation on internal operations.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Less redundant array searching when building neighbors.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added api exports to the OBJMeshUtil methods so they can be called from other modules.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made MeshConvexHull's grid sampler exit when mesh bounds are empty, to avoid ensures on grid w/ zero cell size.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed dynamic mesh CompactInPlace creating a triple-sized TriangleEdges array + add coverage for this case in CheckValidity, and guard against this kind of error breaking AppendWithOffsets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We now do not leave unused vertices in the cluster simplifier mesh result mesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed incorrect transforms on GeometryCollectionToDynamicMesh converter, and added more comments to document the expected coordinate spaces for these meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash in implicit morphology offset operation due to offset grid dimensions overflowing int32.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a possible crash in algorithms that use the sparse solver wrapper, by properly handling failed factorizations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Geometry Script",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added various oriented box functions to geometry script, to create and query / test intersections and convert to meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an OBB containment function to geometry script (matching what simple collision fitting does, but exposing the found oriented box directly).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved geometry script's CopyCollisionMeshesFromObject support for complex collision.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "It now supports any type that implements the IInterface_CollisionDataProvider interface, and specifically should now work better with Skeletal Mesh Components and Spline Mesh Components.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a 'select occluded from outside view' jacketing method to geometry script, to have more controllable occlusion operations (e.g. from specific directions, for specific material IDs/parts of mesh, w/ transparent tris).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also, cleaned up the detect exterior visibility function logic to support the new options and be a bit faster / more robust.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added target edge length QEM and cluster-based simplification methods in geometry script.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "We now more consistently use the term \"Connected Islands\" instead of \"Components\" when referring to connected pieces of a mesh in Geometry Script nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Filled out geometry script list conversion extract/set methods for the various list types: Scalar, UV, Vector and Color.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FOrientedBox is now exposed to Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The 'debug' pins in geometry script are now hidden in the Blueprint graph",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Geometry script now supports standard MikkT tangents in the Compute Tangents node, on platforms where the MikkT library has been compiled (i.e., win/mac/linux).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Vertex and Triangle ID validation to geometry script Mesh Query methods so users do not crash on querying an invalid element ID.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made dynamic mesh pools safer to use from a non-game thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the output param display name for GetMaxMaterialID.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "In geometry script asset creation methods, we now test that the paths for new assets are valid before attempting to use them.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug with \"AppendXWithSimpleCollision\" geometry script methods where repeated calls of a script could accumulate extra copies of the collision shape, because blueprint re-uses output reference objects across script invocations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed requirement that patch unwrap mesh be non-compact.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issue where Geometry Script would maximally simplify a mesh if \"Simplify to Tolerance\" was run with a tolerance of 0.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated incorrect geometry script perlin noise node, and added a corrected v2.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Landscape",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer visualizes disabled landscape patches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now sorts landscapes alphabetically when multiple landscape actors are editable in landscape mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed the landscape Collapse Layer tool to use selective render weightmaps code instead of intermediate render code.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added weightmap support for edit layer selective renders.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a GrassMap RenderEveryFrame command, to debug grass map runtime generation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed landscape tools with the \"Combined Layers Operation\" feature to use new selective layer render code.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Stops using old \"intermediate render\" code and avoids polluting the persistent texture data with intermediate results. The new version is faster and safer.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved the Landscape feature level warning (for shader modes &lt; SM5) from a blocking notification to a simple console log.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Landscape optimization for the editor:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer inspects materials for finding mobile layer names when generating mobile weightmap allocations while there's no weightmap allocations in a given landscape component in the first place.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Performance optimization when undoing landscape edits.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a transient landscape property to track the last selected edit layer index. Edit layer selection state is persistent when toggling between editor modes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed the ability to place Landscape Blueprint brushes from the Place Actors panel.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added all landscape brushes from the Landscape Manage - Blueprint Brush tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled dynamic Landscape Spline control point billboard size and offset in editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "To change the offset and size, configure Spline Icon World ZOffset and Spline Icon Scale under the Landscape Project settings.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "To maintain legacy spline behavior, set CVarLandscapeSplineEnableFixedSpriteIcons=True.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed the Landscape Spline Deform to Landscape buttons used to update spline data for non-edit layer landscapes. With edit layer landscapes, Landscape splines automatically affect the data when a Spline Edit Layer is added.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added API exposure for all public BlueprintCallable Landscape Patch functions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed landscape component's GetGrassTypes to Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added generic World Partition Landscape Builder Commandlet. Builds all landscape grass maps, physical materials, and nanite components.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved landscape.DumpLODs command:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now it only displays the landscape LOD information by default and -detailed needs to be used to get the verbose mip-to-mip delta information.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option to align landscape grass instances with the precise triangle normal when using jittered grid mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also fixed an issue with the triangle normal calculation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added API exposure to virtual functions on landscape patch plugin UCLASSes so that they can be inherited from in other modules.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Remove redundant and unsafe non-blocking landscape nanite build from PreSave. No longer builds Nanite at all on auto-saves.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option to Add Unassigned Blueprint Brushes in the Landscape Edit layer context menu. If a Blueprint brush does not have an assigned edit layer, the right-click context menu will include an option for re-assignment",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a DeleteActors helper in order to let the editor's delete actors dialog run when possible but also to let actors be safely deleted without using the UI in other cases.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Landscape Edit Layer Context Menu customization system.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added the ability to easily extend right-click context menu actions for custom edit layer classes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved LandscapePatch plugin out of Experimental.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UX improvements:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated icons to landscape target layers display order methods.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added sort type (ascending/descending) for this.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The sort/filter options have moved next to filter box within the Layers property (since they affect only the layers that are visible, these buttons should not be present when the property is collapsed).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a number of target layers in the Layers property header, in order to be similar to standard arrays and also the edit layers property above.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Collapse All Edit Layers action to the Edit Layer context menu.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removes all edit layers and flattens the current data into the default edit layer.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated default spline edit layer selection behavior:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Selecting the Splines Edit Layer no longer auto-activates the Splines tool.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Double-Click on the Splines layer, or use the right-click context menu option, to toggle between the Splines Tool and last active tool.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed mobile landscape weightmaps not being taken into account by streaming.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when auto-filling target layers from material.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed height/weight alpha precision loss when merging landscape.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed grid-alignment warnings when creating a landscape with more than one region worth of components.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added refined Water Body underwater detection to avoid applying post-processing when the camera is underneath or outside the bounds of the collision volume",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer calls UpdateResource when changing texture LOD settings for render targets. This fixes the water brush breaking landscape after switching between desktop mobile preview mode and desktop renderer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape legacy weight blending potentially leaving ghost weightmaps on large landscapes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Turned assert about landscape physical material tasks failing to complete on save into an error, since that is something that can happen if the material fails to compile.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash that happened when trying to clear a Landscape Paint Target Layer that was already empty.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when a Landscape Blueprint brush was deleted and then restored via Undo.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed spurious assert when the landscape material references a texture named \"Heightmap\" (implicit name for heightmaps in landscape).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed determinism issue when updating landscapes with conflicts on the border of landscape components that would lead to landscape proxies getting dirty in an inconsistent way.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with World-Partition Landscape Proxy Nanite Materials not updating after using Undo/Redo with the Landscape Paint Tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed invalidations of landscape physical material during painting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The last few frames of a paint stroke could be lost because the invalidations were ignored while a physical material task was still pending.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed several issues with ReinitializeHeight/Weights in landscape patches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash with multiple patches. The render command recorder was not stopped at the right moment: both Render and Blend operations must respect the render mode (Immediate or Recorded), which could be broken in case the renderer was grouped with another one earlier.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape that was not updated after having reinitialization had been executed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when the same patch is rendered in several batches. The boolean bReinitializeHeightOnNextRender does not support this and that supposes that during reinitialization, the patch is rendered in a single batch. The fix artificially increases the batch size to the entire landscape, which is wasteful, but the best we can do until the reinitialization is replaced by a proper landscape edit layer partial merge.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape batched merge not handling multiple weight patches (i.e. multiple target layers) being rendered on the same patch component (the render targets would cycle in between each, leading to invalid blending).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape patches' input area (which was the size of the patch), that would lead to needlessly large batches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed potential determinism issue with landscape patches that could theoretically render before their referenced textures are fully streamed in.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Handle null landscape patch weight entries in the couple of places where it was not.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed invalid checks in landscape batched merge.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Stop over-invalidating on empty landscape components. Change to invalidating only components that added or removed weightmap allocations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed PCG refresh on undo/redo landscape painting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved creation of landscape nanite's UStaticMesh out to the game thread to remove danger of threading issues.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed improper blend of landscape edit layers with custom height/weight flags.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Avoided a crash if saving when FLandscapeTextureStreamingManager is not available.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bad ensure condition when trying to cache data from an empty area in the landscape smooth/flatten/erosion tools.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash with the Landscape Copy Tool when attempting to copy data from an invalid or deleted landscape.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix deleted landscape spline points/segments coming back after duplicating the spline.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash occurring when saving level instances that include World-Partition Landscapes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed ctrl+alt+right click drag increasing/decreasing the landscape brush continuously even when the mouse was still.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed mobile landscape data hash being zeroed when entering PIE. That was leading to all landscape mobile data being rebuilt when entering PIE while in mobile preview mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a landscape flatten tool conflict with undo.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape flatten tool behavior at the edges of geometry.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape painting errors when toggling \"invert\" during a brush stroke.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with the Landscape Resize tool clearing all heightmap/weightmap data for edit-layer based landscapes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with Water Bodies automatically generating invalid collision boxes in the Blueprint editor when changing the Wave Source property.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Prevented a crash when redoing an undo of a Water Zone actor deletion.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with the Landscape Resize tool using the wrong Y position offset while expanding the landscape.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the handling of changing transforms when building landscape groups.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed additive blend mode for landscape texture patches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed various landscape+water new cases where it was assumed that GetWorld() returns a valid world while it's not the case when a world is deleted from the content browser.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved the Landscape Import/Export Exposed user experience by exposing the Landscape Gizmo location property to the Landscape details panel.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash updating landscape edge snapshots when heightmaps are not readable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
```
