                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This makes it possible to avoid switching to a fixed timestep when the delta time is small, bypassing the cvar p.Chaos.ImmPhys.MinStepTime",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new p.Chaos.MinParallelTaskSize cvar and CVarMinParallelTaskSize function to set a threshold of tasks to run in parallel, which can improve performance on low-core platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled some p.Chaos cvars (like p.Chaos.MaxNumWorkers) in Shipping so they can be used to tweak game-specific performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enable some physics cvars (like p.Chaos.MaxNumWorkers) in Shipping so they can be used to tweak game-specific performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for setting CollisionEnabled per ISM body.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed functions for calculating covariance matrix of a set of points and retrieving the dominant eigenvector.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a per poly collision setter function to SkeletalMeshComponent.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved several shapes from Chaos to ChaosCore.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option to treat default as simulated for RBAN.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enforced drive linear force limits when non-linear joint solve is enabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed SphereTraceComponent not returning the hit FaceIndex when tracing against complex shapes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where AddForce related methods did not generate wake events in some scenarios.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now detect and remove null constraints from CCD swept constraints prior to application.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed collision behavior when converting from probe to nonprobe.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized allocation in cable mesh building",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Chaos: Fixed wrong rotation axis when using simd for linear joint solver.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an occasional crash when unwelding rigid bodies.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a physics bug where unwelding via socket name failed to unweld. This could lead to a crash when the parent body was destroyed and a query was performed against the child.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed FKShapeElem copy constructor accidentally changing the CollisionEnabled flag instead of copying it.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Dataflow",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Double clicking on a Dataflow variable now finds the related nodes in the Dataflow graph and sub-graphs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dataflow construction views are now generally more performant for large meshes and allow render data caching.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added transform support to dataflow rendering geometry groups.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added capsule rendering support to the rendering facade.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated the weight map tool in dataflow to more closely match the UI of existing painting tools.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dynamic mesh processor blueprint can now optionally specify that it is ok to run async.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "It is now possible to edit some of the bool / int / float non-connected input parameters inline on Dataflow nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a 'Cut Planes' array input to the PlaneCutter dataflow node, to support directly specifying the cutting plane(s).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The Geometry Script based Dataflow node now exposes the Geometry script parameters out to the Dataflow node as connectable inputs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added general array Dataflow nodes for getting an element or reading the size of an array.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dataflow can now automatically add a node to auto convert from an output type to an input type.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option for dataflow FilterPointsWithMesh node to filter by mesh min/max distances in addition to inside/outside winding number test.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a general dataflow selection -&gt; index array conversion node (so that e.g. one can iterate the selected indices).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for root proxies for Dataflow based Geometry Collection asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled construction view rendering for most of the geometry collection Dataflow nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a generic version of the math Clamp dataflow node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dataflow variable nodes can now be used directly in Subgraphs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the possibility to promote a dataflow input to a variable ( right click menu ).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Geometry Script based dataflow nodes will now open the Geometry Script blueprint when double clicked on.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Dataflow now show an array pin icon for array types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Dataflow node to set a string transform attribute and to select from a string pattern.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added dataflow nodes for conversion from an index or index array to a dataflow selection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Support \"Only Same Parent\" option for TinyGeo \"Merge Geometry\" mode (and corresponding dataflow node).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Dataflow nodes for getting bounds from static mesh and dynamic meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for setting up root proxies in Dataflow.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Dataflow node to set the dynamic state of geometry collection bones.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated the Dataflow Editor to better handle Save As by reconnecting the newly created derived assets (e.g., Dataflow Asset) to the main asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added display of performance data for Dataflow subgraphs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized the Dataflow collection spreadsheet ( up to 25x for large collections ).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Box, Capsule and Convex simple builders as geometry generators for dataflow physics assets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for manipulating bones from the Dataflow Edit Skin Weight tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Fov and planes options to the view menu in both Dataflow simulation and construction views.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crashes due to incorrect selection init for some dataflow fracture nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Expanded out fracture brick pattern bounds by a half-brick, to fix bricks not quite covering the intended bounds in many cases.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made the collection-&gt;mesh dataflow node take an optional selection and perform the conversion more consistently with the collection selection-&gt;meshes dataflow node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed the dataflow 'show/hide inputs' menu to use the localized display names instead of the internal source code names.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add correct struct handling to dataflow context cache to support nested UObject references.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made blueprint dataflow nodes default to evaluate on the game thread, for safety.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added guards against selecting invalid indices. Now returns false instead of crashing on attempting to set an invalid selection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Dataflow graph not re-evaluating when switching from manual to automatic evaluation mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made sure Dataflow nodes performance data is recorded per node even when the data is not shown on screen.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the Dataflow Selection by Level Node to make sure the level attribute exists in the collection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed \"append collections\" dataflow node not updating transform indices correctly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed array support for Dataflow subgraph inputs and outputs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Fluids / Smoke",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added default drag for accurate integration.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for landscape proxies.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Drag model updated buoyancy tests make sure physics assets for rafts computes mass with the correct material.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added water, spray, foam shading improvements, translucent spray particles",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Refactored capture modules in sw emitters to handle overhangs in terrain with better controls rework summary views.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed spike artifacts by only advecting to wet cells. This can avoid issues where we advect into steep areas that we shouldn't be.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "General Physics",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a way to reset the state of a geometry collection (from Blueprint or live from the editor with a button in the component details).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the ability to incrementally create new cache collection assets each time a Chaos cache records.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed Chaos cache observed component functions to Blueprints.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Geometry collections can now be converted to Skeletal meshes (right click on the asset or in Dataflow).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a way to start and stop a Chaos Cache from Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added API for generic sweep traces (Sphere, Boxt, Capsule and Raycast) on the physics thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "It is now possible to query a geometry collection leaf bone using a line trace from Blueprints (FindLeafTransformByLineTrace).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added asset user data support to physics assets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for override materials for geometry collection root proxies.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Creating a Chaos cache from the main menu can now be undone.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Chaos cache not recording events properly after the cache was recorded once.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Chaos cache not properly replaying simulations of geometry collection using root proxies.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Geometry collections with no materials are now assigned a default material. This prevents issues where the geometry collection may have weird rendering artefacts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed spawned geometry collections not properly using the physical material set on the asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash in the geometry collection SetLocalRestTransforms method happening when the rest of the collection is empty.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Chaos Niagara interface not playing trailing events properly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Nanite based geometry collection not replaying properly from a Chaos cache.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed geometry collections not properly waking up when applying velocity.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed force based local fields not working properly when applied to a geometry collection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made sure gravity settings are propagated to cluster unions or cluster group unions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed geometry collection anchored and other attributes being stripped when using strip on cook on Nanite based geometry collection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Chaos cache not properly restoring Simulate Physics or notify break flags when deleted or when removing an observed component.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed geometry collection local field not properly working with partial clusters when using minimal resolution.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with geometry collection Nanite fallbacks not rendering when enabled and when Nanite is disabled in editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Modular Vehicles",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an additional input quantization mechanism.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Networked Physics",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made improvements to how and when RewindData caches physics states along with fixes for KinematicTarget resimulation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized NetworkPhysicsSettings memory footprint from padding and alignment.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a NetworkPhysicsSettingsDataAsset and converted the NetworkPhysicsSettingsComponent to reference the DataAsset instead of holding all settings in memory for each actor instance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the first iteration of Iris support in the NetworkPhysicsComponent with a new base struct for inputs and states along with a new interface for custom implementations to communicate with the NetworkPhysicsComponent.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Scheduled Physics Thread command lambdas with resimulation handling.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added new settings and features to balance simulated proxies and post-resimulation corrections.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Option to trigger a resim when receiving new inputs.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Option to apply input decay curve over a set time instead of over the remaining resim frames.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Option to decay post-resim error in render interpolation exponentially, with a half-life setting.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where inputs can get dropped when the server input-buffer runs empty because only the latest received input gets injected at the front of the buffer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where input wouldn't be produced for locally controlled pawns not using a player controller.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Geometry Collection and Cluster Union post-resimulation render interpolation issues with stuttering and rotational calculation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added fixes for inputs getting lost.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Tools",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "BuildGraph",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the Boolean attribute ReportOnExecution to report diagnostics during execution of a step. The name list attribute ReportOnNodes is used to limit which nodes will report diagnostics during execution.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "UnrealGameSync",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where Update Settings would fallback to Horde when changing theme even though Perforce was previously selected.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Virtual Production",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Compositing",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Marked HoldoutComposite plugin as hidden, since it was deprecated & renamed to CompositeCore.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed the default Lens Distortion rendering mode of the Lens Component to use the Lens Distortion Scene View Extension.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "nDisplay",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed a dependency on legacy Composure.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved stage geometry mesh generation to mitigate deformities when geometry edges are near the mesh equator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where the ICVFX window would throw a failed assert when -rhivalidation was used.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Performance Capture",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "LiveLink:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a LiveLink Broadcast Component. This component currently allows streaming LiveLink data for Transform, Camera, and Skeletal Mesh data. Adding a broadcast component will create a LiveLink subject that automatically rebroadcasts data from the component.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "You can now synchronize a Virtual Subject rebroadcast to one of its subjects.You can enable this through the \"Sync Subject\" option on Virtual Subjects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Live Link Hub:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a playback mode, which is a compact view of the playback widget. Keyboard Shortcuts for Recording Playback",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Left / Backspace: Step back one frame (hold to scrub backward).",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Right: Step forward one frame (hold to scrub forward)",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Space / Enter: Toggle pause Added a \"Select Recording\" button when no recording is selected, which opens a pop up window with the recording list.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added support for config autosave.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Refactored the discovery mechanism to enable seeing all clients without connecting to them automatically.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a crash recovery mechanism that attempts to restore the last autosave after launching following a crash.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Note: When launching multiple Live Link Hub instances, this system will only allow crash recovery for the first session that was launched.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added Client filtering and filter presets support.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added more information to the discovered clients list (IP, Hostname, Project, Level).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Aja: Updated Aja SDK to 17.5.0",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Users can now choose what class of prop component to use. Default is the native version but users can override with their own derived class for uses such as building custom constraint behaviours.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a delegate to emit when a Live Link subject's bool bIsEnabled is modified. Required for Performance Capture workflow to respond to subjects being modified in the Live Link client panel.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed Mocap Manager requiring all spawned characters to be a ACaptureCharacter actor. All ASkeletalMeshActor classes can now be set to the CaptureCharacterClass property in a PCapCharacterDataAsset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed CaptureCharacterClass member type in UPCapCharacterDataAsset from TSoftClassPtr to TSoftClassPtr.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Relocated the Performance Capture properties under a 'Performance Capture' details category for ACaptureCharacter actors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved PIE/SIE usability of the stage manager and the outliner.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Cleaned up unused nodes in mocap manager EW.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Refactor of LiveLink data pausing:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Moved all calls from the individual actor components (performer, prop, retarget) to simple pausing the LiveLink data on the LiveLink client.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Subjects that are paused can still be recorded in Mocap Recorder.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Pausing a subject will update the pause state in the UI in all locations.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Subjects that go invalid will no longer be removed from Record Manager. Only subjects that are disabled (requires UI interaction with Live Link panel to accomplish) will be disabled from being recorded.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed tracking what's paused and what's enabled from the LiveLinkEval struct and renamed to LiveLinkVisual. The array of this struct in the viewmodel now only keeps track of what subjects are being visualised.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "All calls to determine a subject's state or enablement go to the Live Link Blueprint function library functions.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Introduced the functionality to calculate a dynamic prop offset via Blueprint native function (dynamic constraint).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added Function library to query IK Rig and Retargeter properties at run time for calculating dynamic constraint.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improved handling of spawning custom props actors from the PCap Prop data asset.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added runtime module for -game sessions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Refactored actor, actor component and animinstance classes into new runtime module to enable running tools/actors in -game session.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added redirectors to new class locations.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated plugin description to aid discoverability in the plugin browser by including text referring to Mocap Manager.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled Mocap Manager retarget tuner and prop offset widgets to run in PIE/SIE.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added F keyboard binding to focus on Pcap UMG viewport actor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Mocap Manager Viewmodel now caches the initial state of Take Recorder settings and reverts them to the initial state when closing Mocap Manager.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Users can now select a folder for their PCap data.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Can now be a Content Plugin path or a game content path.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now creates a session template per project as part of the first-run workflow, removing dependency away from Engine/Plugin content.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The session template is now unique per uproject.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Did a full pass on all Blueprints, setting namespace to PerformanceCapture on all assets, to prevent functions leaking into the function palette when they're not wanted.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added Hide actor in-game button to outliner, only visible during a multi user session.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added missing delegate for when a Live Link subject is added.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This is needed for Virtual Subjects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added OnLiveLinkSubjectAdded delete to the PerformanceCaptureSubsystem.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now remove illegal characters from the filename of created Skelmesh when using Live Link subject name as the basis for the new asset's name.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved scaled performer mesh workflow:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now uses poseable mesh component to shuttle live link transforms to the new skelmesh.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added ability for user to a freeze the pelvis bone above the origin.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added bone picker so users can choose which bones is the pelvis",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Auto find the pelvis bone function executed on invoking the panel.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Warning if the bones in the given skelmesh do not match the Live Link data.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Modified the bone visualizer to work with any actor containing at least one skinnned mesh component. Always defaults to the first found skinned mesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed pausing/unpausing of render in the main level viewport when starting the custom UMG viewport. This was negatively impacting prop line up workflows when the user wants to use both viewports.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added exclusion list of components to the Take Recorder permission list User Asset data object and a function to audit a Take Recorded actor's components in the motion actor row of Mocap Recorder.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Users can now filter recording on component names.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "LiveLink: Added multi-select for subjects, so you can pause multiple subjects at once.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Live Link Hub:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a column that displays the translated role for a subject (hidden by default).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed Live Link Hub resetting timecode and genlock upon exiting, even if these options were not enabled in the Hub.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Can now pick an interpolation processor if transmitting evaluated data is enabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Pause subjects when pausing a recording so they appear as valid on UE clients. Dragging the playback slider will no longer pause recording on end if the recording wasn't paused.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a prompt to verify if the user intends to close the hub before closing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "You can turn off this behavior by changing the \"Confirm Close\" option in the LiveLinkHub settings.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed a crash when launching a game in shipping configuration with Live Link Hub plugin enabled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed potential Multiuser crash caused by emitting change to take recorder metadata during recording. Emit is now gated behind bIsRecording=false.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Retarget character mesh will now tick and update pose on the same frame as the perforrmer source mesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Prevented base mocap mesh getting set to null after creating a performer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Prevented character name getting set to null when creating a character data asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Prevented pre-requisite cycle when SourceMesh == ControlledMesh because FComponentReference wants to set default to first skelmesh component on the owning actor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash in Performer mesh creation if the chosen skelmesh has no valid skeleton assigned.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed session missing message after first-run creating the base PCap datatables.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Motion outliner UI getting invalid information from the level when assets have been deleted which the mocap actors reference.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed bug with mesh visualizer in Performer mesh workflow not clearing the mesh from the viewport.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed bug where Live Link recording subjects aren't refreshed when subjects are removed from the record manager.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug in the Mocap Manager picker widget preventing excessive calls to the asset registry during Take recording.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated the SourcePerformer, RetargetAsset and bForceAllSkeletalMeshesToFollowLeader properties on ACaptureCharacter in favor of the same properties on URetargetComponent.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated the AdditionalMeshes property on UPCapCharacterDataAsset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Rendering",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed linear versions of the UE emulation color spaces in OpenColorIO plugin config, useful for tonecurve inversion for example.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed lens distortion material default support for packaged games.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Tools",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Live Link Hub:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Store external plugin paths in a versioned directory that reflects the plugin ABI (e.g. \"%LocalAppData%\\UnrealEngine\\LiveLinkHub_5.7\"). Outside of an installed build, the workspace Engine/Config directory is used instead.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added \"auxiliary channel\" endpoint negotiation. It's now possible to register a channel type handler with ILiveLinkHubMessagingModule, and initiate a channel request to a known client using ILiveLinkHubClientsModel.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Fixed not properly replaying tracks that had inconsistent framerate or data.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "A track's timestamps are now always used when seeking to frames across tracks rather than only relying on qualified frame time conversions. For efficiency we still convert the desired frame time to a track's local frame time first which often puts as at or near the desired frame.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Timestamps are now saved and loaded in bulk, rather than with each frame. For old recordings the file is iterated once to load the timestamps, which can be slow.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Added an Upgrade feature which will force load the entire recording into memory and then save it to a new file, providing users a way to convert old animations to the new format, and decrease future load times. The recording list will now specify if a version is outdated or not. If a recording is outdated a context menu option \"Upgrade Recording\" will be available.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed multiple event fires when committing a scrubber change via spin boxes.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Fixed a crash when exiting the app while streaming frames.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added extendable data for Productions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "User defined UStructs can be registered as extended data types and are displayed in the Production Wizard.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This data is saved with each Production in the default engine configuration file (Engine.ini).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "User defined customizations can be registered for the Production Wizard for registered extended data types.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "User defined 'User Settings' tabs can be registered to the Production Wizard.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a Tracking Alignment Tool into the Camera Calibration plugin. This tool aligns two tracking spaces together by calculating the aligned origin transform of one of the tracking spaces.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Remote Control:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Made behaviors rearrangeable in the RC panel.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added Select Source button to the action list",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Also added icon to right click on exposed property right click menu.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Changed \"in use\" visualisation for properties to a background color similar to selection.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added indication of whether a property is bound to a controller.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added support for enums and additional struct types.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "\"Fill path from selected asset\" now looks for selected exposed properties if there are no assets selected.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a stateless controller button.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Revamped path behavior.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added the \"controller\"  category .",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Changed entity bind numbers over to runtime objects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "You can now select bound action sources.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Switchboard:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated the BP OSCListener to use the TR subsystem in all functions. Now all calls to get take metadata use the Subsystem so it can be used without take recorder being open (Mocap Manager)",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Start and stop recording now uses the subsystem and will open a level sequence by default to keep the behaviour the same as previous when triggering start record from SB.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
